name: libhtml-tagset-perl
title: libhtml-tagset-perl
description:
data tables pertaining to HTML
HTML::Tagset contains data tables useful in dealing with HTML.  For instance,
it provides %HTML::Tagset::emptyElement, which lists all of the HTML elements
which cannot have content.  It provides no functions or methods.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-tagset-perl because data tables pertaining to HTML.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-tagset-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-tagset-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-tagset-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
